payload.text:
🎯 Anonymous Tipping

To tip someone in a group chat:
1. Reply to their message with /tip <amount>
   Example: /tip 0.5

The tip is anonymous — the recipient won't see who sent it.

name: /tip command in private chat shows group-only message

payload.text: Tipping only works in group chats. Use /tip <amount> in a group, replying to someone's message.
